facts: Guest had a confirmed direct booking with Bonvoy number attached. At check-in, the hotel said it was oversold and moved the guest to a nearby lower-tier property.
actual_outcome: Demo example: hotel covered relocation and added points after escalation.
reusable_lesson: Emphasize confirmed reservation, Bonvoy number attached, and ask for the Ultimate Reservation Guarantee to be applied in writing.
notes: Synthetic example for demo only. Replace with real summarized DP before public launch.

facts: Flight was cancelled due to crew availability. Passenger was rebooked to the next morning and needed overnight accommodation.
actual_outcome: Demo example: passenger received hotel and meal voucher after asking whether cancellation was controllable.
reusable_lesson: Ask the airline to confirm whether the cancellation was within airline control and reference the airline's DOT-listed customer commitment.
